workos-docs.description: Official WorkOS documentation. Use for AuthKit, users, organizations, memberships, sessions, roles, permissions, webhooks, SSO, Directory Sync, and Admin Portal.

workos-authkit-sdk.description: Official WorkOS AuthKit SDK source for Next.js. Use to verify APIs and implementation details; this project pins @workos-inc/authkit-nextjs@^4 on Next.js 15.3.
